description: Meeting notes, transcript, summary, action-item, and cross-meeting insight workflows.
design_rules: Tasks must stay vendor-neutral within the category.
Tasks should be short enough for high sample count and repeated simulation.
Fake tools should preserve differentiated product logic, not just naming differences.

core_tasks.title: Find a meeting by metadata
core_tasks.goal: Locate meetings by title, date, participant, or keyword clues.

core_tasks.title: Retrieve meeting summary
core_tasks.goal: Fetch summary, highlights, or recap for one meeting.

core_tasks.title: Retrieve transcript evidence
core_tasks.goal: Find transcript snippets or evidence for a question.

core_tasks.title: Extract action items
core_tasks.goal: Identify next steps, owners, and follow-ups.

core_tasks.title: Search across meetings
core_tasks.goal: Find recurring topics across multiple meetings.

core_tasks.title: Compare themes across meetings
core_tasks.goal: Summarize repeated objections, risks, or decisions.

core_tasks.title: Produce a recap review
core_tasks.goal: Explain what the tool did well or poorly for the task set.

reserve_tasks.title: Upload recording for analysis
reserve_tasks.goal: Analyze an uploaded audio or recording artifact.

reserve_tasks.title: Live meeting query
reserve_tasks.goal: Query a currently active or just-finished meeting.

explicit_exclusions: CRM mutation as a required task
